CustomField.label: Value Form Qualified API Name
CustomField.description: Qualified API name of the Flow Tool Kit form used to add or edit the value (cell) records from the Universal Budget grid. Blank hides those actions for this budget.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Qualified API name (e.g. FlowToolKit__Value_Edit) of the form used to edit individual amount records from the grid's cell pencil. Leave blank to hide it.
